zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun於1415年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun9歲，母親Marjory Bruce26歲。他於大約1438年與Margaret de Cathcart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年7月在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun于1415年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun9岁，母亲Marjory Bruce26岁。他于大约1438年与Margaret de Cathcart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年7月在英国苏格兰雷福福爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun was born in 1415, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun, was 9 and his mother, Marjory Bruce, was 26. He married Margaret de Cathcart about 1438, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in July 1480, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun est né en 1415, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Marjory Bruce, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Cathcart environ 1438, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en juillet 1480, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, Unit: Linlithgow, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun 1415 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun 9 und seine Mutter Marjory Bruce 26. Er hat um 1438 in Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret de Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juli 1480 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Margaret de Cathcart circa 1438, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel luglio 1480, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sempill VI of Elliotstounが1415年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstounは9歳，母Marjory Bruceは26歳であった。約1438年にイギリススコットランドでMargaret de Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年7月にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun(이)가 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun(은)는 9세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Bruce(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Margaret de Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 7월 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, Unit: Linlithgow, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun nasceu em 1415, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Bruce, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Cathcart aproximadamente 1438, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em julho de 1480, em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun родился в 1415 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert V Sempill of Eliotstoun было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Bruce, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Cathcart около 1438 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер июль 1480 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

Se casó con Margaret de Cathcart aproximadamente 1438, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
